title: Human Approval, Trustworthy Preview, Pause, Expiry, and Resume
description: The model asks “Are you sure?”, hides exact recipients and amount, edits arguments after approval, treats silence as consent, and cannot safely resume after process restart. Learners cumulatively produce cryptographically bound approval checkpoint through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trigger approval from effect class, value, uncertainty, novelty, policy, affected party, data sensitivity, and user settings before execution.
Render application-owned exact tool, arguments, target, before and after state, consequences, reversibility, cost, and alternatives accessibly.
Bind approval to user, session, policy, tool version, normalized arguments digest, preview digest, expiry, and one execution nonce.
